attributes.action: Stop Labour from removing our monarchy from the UK
attributes.additional_details: Put this choice to public vote, the people will not be controlled by government. The king needs to step up and save our country before it's too late and our history fades.
attributes.background:
Address the parliament with the public's genuine concern.  The UK is being taken over by Labour who intended to strip our King of overall power. 
This is the continued work of Tony Blair just in the form of Kier Starmer, once the gov have full control public freedom will end

rejection.details: The Government have not announced any plans to remove the monarchy from the UK.
